# viettelidc_ovpc_key_pair (Resource)

ViettelIDC Key Pair — SSH key pair for VM access.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "viettelidc_ovpc_key_pair" "deploy" {
  key_name = "deploy-key"
  vpc_id   = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}

output "private_key_url" {
  value     = viettelidc_ovpc_key_pair.deploy.download_url
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key_name` (String) Key pair name.

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Falls back to provider default when unset.

### Read-Only

- `download_url` (String, Sensitive) URL to download the private key file. Available immediately after creation.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
